Tired of Settling? Discover the Proven Path to Meeting Your Perfect Match!

Finding a truly exceptional partner isn’t easy, but you don’t have to settle. Our elite coaching helps high-achievers like you attract the relationship you’ve always wanted.

At I Deserve Love, we guide you to find your ideal partner with a personalized, proven approach. Love doesn’t have to be a gamble — let us help you create the relationship you deserve.

  • Personalized Coaching

  • Proven Blueprint

  • Ongoing Support

  • Personalized coaching

  • Proven strategies

  • Ongoing support

featured on

featured on

Fae

trusted dating coach & Relationship expert

THE FAERY MATCHMAKER | CEO & FOUNDER OF IDL DIAMOND CLUB |

LOVE MANIFESTATION EXPERT AND DATING | COACH

Fae, aka The Faery Matchmaker, is the CEO and founder of IDL Diamond Club and IDeserveLove Matchmaking. She also has created an online coaching program to attract love into your life and help you overcome your blocks and patterns in relationships and dating.

She began her career studying psychology with a focus on NLP

(neuro-linguistic programming) understanding the reasons people pick the partners they do and act the way they do in relationships.

During her studies, she discovered her intuitive ability to help her clients decode their own underlying values, break old patterns, and open up to the loving relationship they've always dreamed of.

Sign Up today!

Join 10,000+ members finding their

perfect match with Diamond Club.

I Deserve Love Club Gallery

Don’t wait — your perfect match is closer than you think.

Centered Image Slider
1 / 33

Real people. Real success stories.

Discover what’s possible with the Diamond Club.

We believe that we all deserve love

Our mission here is to find you your love in the most efficient and effective way possible.

Our services are tailored specifically to you, and we go so much deeper than your average Matchmaking agency: rather than simply matching a rich man to a pretty woman, we understand that these things make an impression but don’t make a relationship last.

Instead, our members have their own personal recruiter/matchmaker who matches based on preferences, values and goals that in turn will create quality, loving, and lasting relationships.


We offer 1 on 1 Matchmaking


We offer 1 on 1 Matchmaking where each client has their own personal Recruiter/Matchmaker who curates the best possible matches, and we also offer Members only Luxury singles events all across the United States.

BASED IN SOUTH FLORIDA WITH HUBS IN ALL THE MAJOR U.S. CITIES

I Deserve Love is the ultimate match club for celebrities, millionaires/billionaires, and executives. We are incredibly exclusive by uniquely servicing and bringing together a global network of selectively invited, hand picked clientele. On top of that, we are one of the only matchmaking agencies to combine their top notch matchmaking services with luxurious singles events nationwide.

I Deserve love EXECUTIVE DATING COACHING

When you're successful, you may find yourself with countless options, but having so many choices can be overwhelming, and they may not even come close to what you truly need.


Often, we are drawn to surface-level beauty or success, but this can lead to shallow relationships that don't stand the test of time.

Over the years,

Fae has seen this happen over and over again, and it’s her goal to stop this from happening.

With a background in NLP and Psychology, Fae helps her clients figure out their dating and relationship patterns so that they can get to the root of their problems and finally find a healthy lasting relationship.

Her coaching success rate is incredibly high, and almost all of her past executive dating coaching clients are now either married or in long term relationships.

GRIEF COUNSELING

Losing a loved one can be the most devastating thing in the world. Especially after a long relationship or marriage.

After losing a partner herself, Fae understands grief can help clients find self-love, and happiness.

She has helped many clients overcome and accept the loss of a loved one and move forward to finding new love.

Hear Our Clients Journey With I Deserve Love

“I found Jacqueline, and it really helped me a lot, because what it did for me was something that helped me save a lot of time, a lot of energy, but more importantly, gave me the opportunity to meet a lot of different amazing women."

“I signed up for IDL a few months ago and I came to the party here down in Miami and she set me up with three beautiful blond girls that I met tonight.”

“I am a trauma surgeon, trauma doctor... I am excited about working with Jacque, my fairy matchmaker. My entire career was spent saving lives and now that I'm focusing on my love life, who better to rely on than my fairy matchmaker.”

“IDL is the perfect ideal, you know, matchmaker to go. Not just she'll introduce you to the right women, but the events she puts on are so much fun and I recommend, you know, signing up and getting to know Jacque.”

“My name is Steve. After working with Jackie at ID L, she matched me up with what is now the love of my life. She's amazing. The company is amazing and I'm so grateful to her and what she provided for me.”

“But at our very first meeting, I just had the sense that Jacque would help me find my person and she did and thanks to her, I found the love of my life and it would not have happened without Jacque. So if you're looking for love, I cannot recommend Jacque.”

  • Tailored for clients personal needs to be the best version of themselves

Billed Yearly

Experience a total transformation in your love life with the I Deserve Love Membership. Whether you're looking for lasting love, improved dating success, or enhanced relationship skills, we’re here to guide you every step of the way.

Client Love


If you are looking for the absolute best match club in the this country, you need to give IDL Diamond Club a shot. Forget about all the ridiculous online dating sites, and give yourself a ‘real’ chance to meet the love of your life-just like I did. I even tried other match services, but none compare to what Jacqui offers at IDL. She’s an exceptionally personable person and gives extreme attention to detail which increases your chance of finding “the” one. Plus, she somehow has access to the best quality single people you can find (look & personality). You will not find these amazing people at other match clubs, and you certainly won’t find them online. Jacqui is extremely reasonable for what she offers, plus she is constantly throwing the coolest single parties ever. You can’t go wrong with Jacqui and IDL as I know better than anyone. Best decision I ever made! Thank you IDL

— Steve

Join thousands of others who have transformed their love lives with

IDL Diamond Club. Your success story could be next.
